hero.title: The Original Padel Clubs in Mauritius
hero.subtitle: Two destinations. One standard. Built for daily play, community, and premium experience.

featuredBlocks.title: Daily play by the north coast
featuredBlocks.meta: Social sessions and accessible club rhythm
featuredBlocks.description: Urban Sport Grand Baie brings players together through a compact club setup designed for repeat play and community flow.

featuredBlocks.title: Destination venue
featuredBlocks.description: The west-coast venue brings more scale, stronger event potential, and a broader destination feel to the Urban Sport experience.

membershipFaq.question: Can I book without a membership?
membershipFaq.answer: Yes. Membership improves pricing, access, and priority, but public booking requests remain available.

membershipFaq.question: Do plans work across both clubs?
membershipFaq.answer: Premium and Elite are positioned as cross-club products for players who move between Grand Baie and Black River.

membershipFaq.question: How are tournaments handled?
membershipFaq.answer: Priority access and member advantages can be managed locally by the club team through the admin panel.
